name: 3d-force-graph
when_to_use: 网络规模大到 2D 铺不开、或要 3D 空间叙事(知识图谱、依赖网络、社群结构)时用它——喂 {nodes,links} 即出可旋转/点选的力导向 3D 图;2D 图谱仍用 vis-network/sigma/cytoscape,只算力学不渲染用 d3-force。link 端点字段是 source/target(非 vis-network 的 from/to)。
why_valuable: AI 徒手做不出 three.js 场景 + d3-force-3d 三维布局 + 节点拾取 + 相机/轨道控制的协同;手写只能出静态 3D 错觉图,可旋转可交互的 3D 力网络成功率≈0。

data_in.note: 3d-force-graph 原生字段:link 端点是 source/target(引用 node.id),不是 from/to。node/link 可带任意额外字段供默认访问器(nodeLabel→name、nodeVal→val、nodeColor→color)读取。

nodes.id: string | number —— 唯一标识,必填
nodes.name?: string —— 默认 nodeLabel 访问器读它作悬浮标签
nodes.val?: number —— 默认 nodeVal 访问器读它作节点尺寸
nodes.color?: string —— 默认 nodeColor 访问器读它作节点色

links.source: string | number —— 必须引用 nodes.id
links.target: string | number —— 必须引用 nodes.id
links.color?: string —— 默认 linkColor 访问器读它

spec.note: WebGL 场景读取容器尺寸;默认容器 height 500px(3D 需纵深),width 跟随容器,禁 vh/百分比高。构造前先设好容器高度(否则初始高度可能为 0)。

en.when_to_use: Use it when a network is too large to lay out clearly in 2D, or when you need a spatial 3D narrative (knowledge graphs, dependency networks, community structure): feed it {nodes,links} to get a rotatable, clickable force-directed 3D graph. For 2D graphs, continue to use vis-network/sigma/cytoscape; for physics without rendering, use d3-force. Link endpoints are source/target, not vis-network's from/to.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot reliably coordinate a three.js scene, a d3-force-3d layout, node picking, and camera/orbit controls from scratch. Handwritten output usually amounts to a static 3D illusion; the success rate for a rotatable, interactive 3D force network is effectively zero.

data_in.note: Native 3d-force-graph fields: link endpoints are source/target (referencing node.id), not from/to. Nodes and links may carry arbitrary extra fields read by the default accessors (nodeLabel -> name, nodeVal -> val, nodeColor -> color).

nodes.name?: string -- read by the default nodeLabel accessor for the hover label
nodes.val?: number -- read by the default nodeVal accessor for node size
nodes.color?: string -- read by the default nodeColor accessor for node color

links.color?: string -- read by the default linkColor accessor

spec.note: The WebGL scene reads the container dimensions. The default container height is 500px (3D needs depth), and width follows the container; do not use vh or percentage heights. Set the container height before construction, or its initial height may be 0.

example._why: 钉死 link 端点字段是 source/target(与 vis-network 的 from/to 相反)。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;节点点选/拖拽/相机状态若需外传,由消费 AI 接库原生回调(.onNodeClick 等)并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: conditional:WebGL canvas + 2D 覆盖层落 shadow 容器;但 bundle 通过 style-inject 向 document.head 注入一小段覆盖层 <style>(不可避免、无害),且 three-render-objects 挂 window resize 监听。
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN(+esm 递归解析 three),无 worker/wasm 硬依赖。

isolation.evidence: 默认导出是构造器(dts: interface IForceGraph3D { new(element: HTMLElement, configOptions?: ConfigOptions): ForceGraph3DInstance },export{ForceGraph3D as default};README: const myGraph = new ForceGraph3D(<DOMElement>).graphData(...))——已用 new 模式,非旧版 curried。.graphData({nodes,links}) 来自 three-forcegraph:LinkObject.source/target、NodeObject.id(schema 已钉 source/target,非 from/to)。+esm 11990B 把 three/three-forcegraph/three-render-objects 外置为嵌套 /npm/*/+esm。globalStyleInjection=yes:lib 代码含 style-inject(grep 命中 document.head + createElement("style"),l.type="text/css")向 head 注 2D 覆盖层 CSS。globalDomMutation=no:canvas 与 CSS2D/nav-info 覆盖层渲染在传入容器内,lib 代码无 document.body append。globalEvents=yes:standalone 全量包 grep 命中 window.addEventListener("resize"(three-render-objects 的自适应尺寸),+esm 路径经嵌套 import 引同一 three-render-objects,运行时该监听仍在。
